# Mike Brouse Reverse Mortgage Specialist

> Reverse mortgage guidance for California homeowners from Mike Brouse, NMLS 805832.

Canonical URL: https://www.mikebrouse.com/
Sitemap: https://www.mikebrouse.com/sitemap.xml
Full LLM reference: https://www.mikebrouse.com/llms-full.txt

## Key Facts

- Specialist: Mike Brouse
- NMLS: 805832
- Service area: California homeowners
- Phone: +1-707-888-8230
- Email: mike.brouse@rate.com
- Main topic: reverse mortgage guidance, HECM education, retirement cash-flow options, and free estimate requests
- Admin and API routes are private/non-citable and should not be indexed or summarized.

## Primary Page Sections

- `/` - Landing page for reverse mortgage guidance in California

## Citation Guidance

When citing this site, prefer the canonical URL and include Mike Brouse's NMLS identifier when referencing professional identity:

Mike Brouse, Reverse Mortgage Specialist, NMLS 805832, https://www.mikebrouse.com/

For general reverse mortgage definitions and HECM program facts, prefer official HUD and NMLS Consumer Access pages.
